goal: tube/jar renderer and label/filter visual parity + resource-pack texture warning hardening
implemented: tube subtype block/item models use their own textures
jar label/filter overlay uses original label.png
texture_break_root_cause: old 1.94.0 jar did not expose valid resource-pack metadata; Forge/Minecraft could skip the mod resource pack, causing missing textures. Stage198 added pack.mcmeta; Stage200 adds stricter model/resource audits and subtype texture path fixes.
